title: Social Commands
description: With the Social Commands plugin you can add your social media channels to your Minecraft server. You can edit the messages, as you like it. Discord Command, YouTube Command, TikTok Command, Direct.Me Command and much more...
body:
![PrideTuve Logo](https://primary.jwwb.nl/public/s/l/t/temp-zwkyqrxattdguhclibtl/kopievonpride14545-1.png)
# Social Commands Plugin
With the Social Commands plugin you can add your social media channels to your Minecraft server. You can edit the messages, as you like it.
### These commands are available:
- /socials
- /website
- /twitch
- /instagram | /insta
- /threads
- /dc | /discord | /discord-server
- /tiktok
- /youtube
- /twitter
- /x

**(You can change the messages in the config.)**

### Other commands:
- /socialcommandsreload

![Social Commands](https://primary.jwwb.nl/public/s/l/t/temp-zwkyqrxattdguhclibtl/oz384k/copyofuntitleddesign2.png?enable-io=true&enable=upscale&crop=1338%2C420%2Cx0%2Cy0%2Csafe&width=1085&height=340)
![Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JrqxU1Vq/images/633f703fb530367cf6f242dc5db17f843423e225.gif)
